title: July 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 13''' is the 194th day (195th in leap years) of the year, with 171 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1937|1937]] – [[Jack Purvis]] is born.
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Harrison Ford]] is born.
*1942 – [[Tom Palmer]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Roger Jackson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Tom Kenny]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[R.J. Palacio]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Kaare Andrews]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Kari Wahlgren]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 64|''Star Wars'' (1977) 64]] released.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 4|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 4]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 108|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 108]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Star Wars Tales 24]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Celebration Europe (2007)|Celebration Europe]] opens.
*[[2011]] – [[Invasion: Revelations 1|''Invasion: Revelations'' 1]] published.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars: Knight Errant Volume 1: Aflame]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Motive Studios]] is founded.
*[[2018]] – [[Sutā Wōzu Kūso Kagaku Dokuhon (2018)|''Sutā Wōzu Kūso Kagaku Dokuhon'' (2018)]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Grant Imahara]] dies.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Make Your Own Pop-Up Book: Ghoul-actic Halloween]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace Graphic Novel Adaptation]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Darth Maul and Other Dark Side Followers]]'' published in [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]].<noinclude>
*[[2022]] – [[Bounty Hunters 25|''Bounty Hunters'' 25]] published.
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian (2022) 1|''The Mandalorian'' (2022) 1]] published.
